description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure features a combination of light beige and gray exterior walls, large rectangular windows, and a prominent garage at the front. The property is enclosed by a perimeter wall and includes a driveway, a small lawn, and a palm tree near the entrance. The house is accompanied by a detached secondary building, likely a guest house or garage, situated within the same fenced lot. The main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch and a visible staircase leading to the upper floor. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, a garage, and a fenced yard featuring a driveway and a palm tree. The property includes a secondary building and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, palm tree, and driveway leading into the fenced property.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the secondary building, backyard, and the back side of the main house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the property, the lawn, and the relationship between the main and secondary buildings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the flat roof, upper story windows, and the side yard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, modern door, and adjacent palm tree, set within a paved driveway.
